title: The Reason for 'Uthmin ' s Removal of al-Walid and His Appointment of Said as Governor [in Kufah
description: His Appointment of Said as Governor [in Kufah) It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu'ayb-SayfMuhammad and Talhah: When `Uthman learned of the conflict between 'Abdallah (b. Masud) and Said (b. Abi Wagga$), he grew angry with both men and resolved [to deal with] them. Then he abandoned that [notion] and removed Sa'd [alone] from office, recovering [from him] what he owed (to the treasury in Kufah]. He confirmed 'Abdallah in office and issued instructions to him. To replace Sa'd as governor he appointed al-Walid b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
